base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of elimination_mode_confirm — a ui from 1986 legend of zelda. 'ELIMINATION MODE / PLEASE SELECT FILE / 1 2 3' — deletion confirmation screen. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
